expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: The output states the focus areas but provides no Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts demonstrating enforcement/coverage: “This benchmark is explicitly about Phase 5b shipment-checkpoint enforcement (prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, close or save decision safety)… it does not include any Phase 5b run outputs (checkpoint audit/delta/draft)…”. It also notes missing required artifacts: “missing context/checkpoint_audit_BCIN-7289.md, context/checkpoint_delta_BCIN-7289.md, drafts/qa_plan_phase5b_r*.md”. Therefore explicit checkpoint coverage cannot be validated.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The result is explicitly framed as a Phase 5b evaluation and checks Phase 5b required artifacts and rubric: “What Phase 5b must prove… Phase 5b requires: context/checkpoint_audit…, context/checkpoint_delta…, drafts/qa_plan_phase5b…”. It concludes failure due to missing Phase 5b runtime artifacts, which is aligned with phase5b gating.
